prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Island). State whether it applies to England and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The Livestock Demographic Data Groups (LDDG) are formed by representatives from the Animal and Plant Health Agency (APHA), which operates in England and is involved in livestock data management and epidemiology affecting livestock health and demographics across the region.
